title: Goety's Delight
description: This module is an addon for Farmer's Delight and goety.
body:
This mod is an addon for Farmer's Delight and goety. It introduces goety-themed foods (including block-form foods) and beverages, along with knives crafted from goety materials and new kitchen tools made with goety resources. Enhance your dark magical studies with gourmet delights!
> 这个模组是农夫乐事和诡厄巫法的附属。它介绍了以诡厄巫法为主题的食品和饮料，以及用诡厄巫法材料制成的刀具和用诡厄巫法资源制成的新型厨房工具。用美食来增强您的黑魔法！
